overview: Scarfang is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ice Cavern. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 600 HP, 17 physical damage, 130 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Common Wolf Attack Forward at 120% ratio (204 base damage).

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Common Wolf Attack Forward (120%), Common Wolf Attack Left (120%), Common Wolf Attack Right (120%), and more.

phases.name: Rush / Charge
phases.description: 1 rush/charge attacks for gap-closing. Common Wolf Attack Jump (120%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
